summary.summary: When an override duration was 0 (treated as indefinite) the code previously computed end == start, giving the RuleMark zero width and preventing it from rendering. The change makes duration == 0 set the end to Date(timeIntervalSinceNow: 7200) (now + 2 hours); otherwise it uses start.addingTimeInterval(durationAsTimeInterval).
summary.userFacingImpact: Indefinite overrides that previously did not appear in the Live Activity chart because the rendered bar had zero width should now be visible: the bar is extended to now + 2 hours to match the chart's x-axis domain. Evidence is from the PR description, commit message, and the code diff.
